expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。 [Width]、[Height]、[Depth] 是总的尺寸，[BoardThick] 是顶部、底部和侧板的厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是后板的厚度。 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดกระดานสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height],[Depth] คือขนาดรวม, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของกระดานด้านบน, ล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของกระดานด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu ván Trên, Dưới và Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày ván Nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ay kabuuang Pagsukat, [BoardThick] ang Kapal ng Top, Bottom, at Side Board na materyal, [BackBoardThick] ang Kapal ng materyal ng Background Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: [Width], [Height],[Depth] သည် စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာချက် ဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည် ထိပ်, အောက်, ဘက်ခွဲပစ္စည်းအထူ ဖြစ်သည်။ [BackBoardThick] သည် နောက်ခံဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူ ဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាហ្វាយបន្ថែមសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជាការវាស់ស្ទង់សរុប,[BoardThick] គឺជា កម្រាស់ឈើចុង,គ្រាប់ត្នោត,[BackBoardThick] របស់កម្រាស់ឈើ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄຳນວນຂະຫນາດຂອງຄວາມຍາວເພື່ອຕູ້ [Width] , [Height],[Depth] ,[Top] (AI translated, please check)
